data.content: Implementation complete on feature/terminal-light-theme at aec607fd6d49. Three fixes delivered: (1) FULL THEME COVERAGE: Expanded ConversationLogTheme interface from 14 to 80+ tokens covering all subcomponents — SessionCard, SessionCardHeader, PromptEntryRow, ResponseEntryRow, RawEventDetails, InteractionPicker, InteractionDropdown, InteractionOption, FilterDropdown, FilterDropdownMenu, FilterOptionRow. All components now consume theme object via prop drilling from AgentHistoryConversationLog. Dark hex colors (#1a1a2e, #16162a, #e0e0e0) removed from all component files and centralized in theme helper. Light theme uses dark text (text-slate-900/800/700) on light backgrounds (bg-white/bg-slate-50) for high contrast. (2) THEME TOGGLE IN CONVERSATION LOG HEADER: Added Sun/Moon icon + Switch toggle directly in ConversationLogHeader, so users can switch themes without opening Debug or Settings. (3) TAB-BASED DEBUGGER: Replaced grid-cols-2 50/50 split with Console/Debug tab bar. Debug tab renders HistoryDebugPanel at full width. Changed debugPanelOpen boolean to activeTab enum in use-agent-history-state. New file conversation-log-panels.tsx extracts TabBar, SessionPicker, DashedMessage, LoadingLogsMessage, SessionsList, ConsolePanelContent to keep main file under 500 lines. Updated tests: debug-integration test uses activeTab, theme-contract test verifies both dark/light palettes in theme helper and confirms no hardcoded hex in component files. Quality gates: lint 0 errors, tsc clean, 208 test files / 2382 tests passing, build OK.
